playbook.intent: An honest operating rhythm for a one-person SaaS: which day for shipping, which for marketing, which for inbox, plus the kill-switch for context-switching that destroys solo productivity.
playbook.scope: An honest operating rhythm for a one-person SaaS: which day for shipping, which for marketing, which for inbox, plus the kill-switch for context-switching that destroys solo productivity.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Pick weekly themes
stage.intent: Assign each weekday a single theme.

tasks.task: Cluster work into themes (ship / market / inbox / admin)
Reserve at least one deep-work block per ship day

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every weekday has a single dominant theme.

stage.name: Revenue-relevance filter
stage.intent: Apply the money filter to every new task.

tasks.task: Define the revenue-relevance filter (yes / maybe / no)
Apply it to your current backlog

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when filter has cut >=20% of backlog.

stage.name: Context-switch protocol

tasks.task: Define the rules for switching modes (max once/day)
Set up rituals for entering/exiting each mode
Note the cost of unplanned switches

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when rules are committed and visible.

stage.name: Tripwires + burnout signals
stage.intent: Catch burnout before it costs a month.

tasks.task: Define personal burnout tripwires (sleep, mood, output)
Pre-write the response if any tripwire fires

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when self-check fires onto the calendar.

stage.name: Weekly review ritual

tasks.task: Run the solo weekly review (shipped / cut / next)

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when review is committed and next-week is primed.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content solo-founder-operating-system-weekly-cadence-focus-discipline --format md, agent: faion get-content solo-founder-operating-system-weekly-cadence-focus-discipline --format context, json: faion get-content solo-founder-operating-system-weekly-cadence-focus-discipline --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
